channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SBIN] State Bank of India Raises Tier 2 Bonds Worth ₹ 6,051 Crore
item.description:
State Bank of India, through its bidding updates on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited, has announced the successful completion of a Basel lll compliant Tier 2 bond issuance. The bank issued 6,051 non-convertible, taxable, redeemable, subordinated, unsecured, and fully paid-up bonds, each with a face value of ₹ 1 crore. The bidding took place on the EBP platform of NSE, with a total of 47 bids received. The bonds, which carry a coupon of 7.05%, are proposed to be listed on BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The issue size matures on 20.03.2036, with an issuer call date on the 5th anniversary of the deemed date of allotment or any anniversary date thereafter.

  • State Bank of India raises ₹ 6,051 crore through Basel lll compliant Tier 2 bonds
  • Issued 6,051 non-convertible, taxable, redeemable, subordinated, unsecured, and fully paid-up bonds
  • Bonds carry a coupon of 7.05%
  • Proposed to be listed on BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited
  • Maturity date set for 20.03.2036 with an issuer call date on the 5th anniversary of the deemed date of allotment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STATE BANK OF INDIA | Category: Investment

item.title: [MITSU] Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd Appoints Ms. Gargi Sawant as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
item.description:
Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd has appointed Ms. Gargi Sawant as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. This intimation is made under Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The contact details of the Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) authorized for determining materiality of an event or information and making disclosures to the Stock Exchange under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations are provided.

  • Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd has appointed Ms. Gargi Sawant as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer.
  • The appointment is made under Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • Contact details of KMPs authorized for determining materiality of an event or information and making disclosures to the Stock Exchange under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations are provided.
  • The information is also available on the company’s website at www.mitsuchem.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KHAZANCHI] Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd. to Form Trust for CSR Activities
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd. has approved the formation and proposed registration of a Trust for undertaking Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities. This decision aligns with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd. to form a Trust for CSR activities
  • Trust formation in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013
  • Move aligns with SEBI Regulation 30 of LODR, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd | Category: CSR

item.title: [INERTIAST] Asgard Alcobev Limited Announces Strategic Manufacturing Alliance with Brews & Bliss LLP to Revive Golden Eagle Beers in North East Region
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Asgard Alcobev Limited, formerly known as Banganga Paper Industries Limited, has announced a strategic manufacturing agreement between its subsidiary CMJ Breweries Private Limited and Brews & Bliss LLP, an authorized partner of Mohan Meakin Limited. This partnership aims to recreate the magic of the iconic Golden Eagle Beers of Mohan Meakin Limited in the North East Region, with CMJ Breweries manufacturing and distributing the Golden Eagle portfolio exclusively for the entire NE zone and Bhutan. The agreement is expected to strengthen the presence and availability of Golden Eagle Beers across the North East and select neighboring markets, while providing large economic benefits for both partners, consumers, and shareholders.

  • Asgard Alcobev Limited's subsidiary, CMJ Breweries Private Limited, enters a strategic manufacturing agreement with Brews & Bliss LLP
  • Exclusive contract to manufacture and distribute Golden Eagle portfolio for the North East zone and Bhutan
  • Partnership aims to strengthen the presence and availability of Golden Eagle Beers across the North East and select neighboring markets
  • 12-month lock-in period linked to the minimum guaranteed quantity commitment to CMJ
  • Collaboration of manufacturing strength, operational alignment, and market reach between the two companies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INERTIA STEEL LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [BAJFINANCE] Bajaj Finance Appoints Tushar Deb as Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Part A, Para A of Schedule Il of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, Bajaj Finance Ltd has classified Mr. Tushar Deb, Executive Vice President - DMS, as the Senior Management Personnel of the Company with effect from 1 April 2026. Tushar Deb is a seasoned Debt Management leader with over 25.5 years of experience across various sectors. He has been associated with Bajaj Finance Limited for over 12.5 years and will be heading the entire Debt Management for the organization covering B2B, B2C, retail loan portfolios across urban and rural markets and compliance, audit, COE, and strategy for the function.

  • Mr. Tushar Deb classified as Senior Management Personnel of Bajaj Finance Ltd
  • Tushar Deb has over 25.5 years of experience in debt management
  • He will be heading the entire Debt Management for the organization
  • Tushar has been associated with Bajaj Finance Limited for over 12.5 years
  • He has managed large-scale portfolios and played a key role in building pan-India Debt management infrastructure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bajaj Finance Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SASKEN] Sasken Technologies Pays SOP Fine to BSE and NSE for Non-Compliance
item.description:
Sasken Technologies Ltd has paid a fine of Rs. 11.28 lakhs plus GST to BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) for non-compliance with Regulation 17(1) & 20(2) / (2A) of the Listing Regulations. The fine was levied for not adhering to the regulations regarding the Company's Board composition and the composition of the Stakeholders Relationship Committee. The Company has expressed its concern to the Stock Exchanges about not being given a chance for a personal hearing.

  • Sasken Technologies pays SOP fine to BSE and NSE
  • Fine of Rs. 11.28 lakhs plus GST levied for non-compliance
  • Non-compliance with Regulation 17(1) & 20(2) / (2A) of the Listing Regulations
  • Company's Board composition and Stakeholders Relationship Committee affected
  • Company expresses concern over lack of personal hearing

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sasken Technologies Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SBIN] State Bank of India Raises ₹ 6,051 Crores at 7.05% Coupon Rate Through Basel III Compliant Tier 2 Bond Issuance
item.description:
State Bank of India (SBI), the country's largest lender, raised ₹ 6,051 crores at a coupon rate of 7.05% through its second Basel III compliant Tier 2 bond issuance for the current financial year. The bonds are issued for a tenor of 10 years, with a call option after 5 years and each anniversary date thereafter. The issue attracted bids of approximately 2 times against the base issue size of ₹ 5,000 crores, indicating a strong response from investors. The investors were across provident funds, pension funds, mutual funds, banks etc. Based on the response, the Bank has decided to accept ₹ 6,051 crores at a coupon rate of 7.05% payable annually for a tenor of 10 years with a call option after 5 years and each anniversary dates thereafter.

  • State Bank of India raised ₹ 6,051 crores through Basel III compliant Tier 2 bond issuance.
  • The bonds are issued for a tenor of 10 years with a call option after 5 years and each anniversary date thereafter.
  • The issue attracted bids of approximately 2 times against the base issue size of ₹ 5,000 crores.
  • The investors were across provident funds, pension funds, mutual funds, banks etc.
  • Based on the response, the Bank has decided to accept ₹ 6,051 crores at a coupon rate of 7.05%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STATE BANK OF INDIA | Category: Investment

item.title: [PNGJL] P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd Opens New Store in Pune, Maharashtra
item.description:
P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd has announced the opening of a new store under the Franchise Owned, Company Operated (FOCO) model at Supercon Residency, Shirine Garden, Aundh, Pune, Maharashtra. The store was inaugurated on March 17, 2026, at approximately 06:00 P.M., bringing the total number of stores to 73.

  • P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd has expanded its presence with a new store in Pune, Maharashtra
  • The new store is operated under the Franchise Owned, Company Operated (FOCO) model
  • The store was inaugurated on March 17, 2026
  • The total number of stores now stands at 73

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ONELIFECAP] Onelife Capital Advisors Ltd Allots 24000000 Equity Shares Through Right Issue at Rs 15 Each
item.description:
Onelife Capital Advisors Ltd has allotted 2,40,00,000 Rights Equity Shares of face value of Rs 10 each for cash at an issue price of Rs 15 each, including a premium of Rs 5 per Rights Equity Share. This allotment has increased the paid-up equity share capital of the Company from Rs 13,36,00,000 (consisting of 1,33,60,000 Equity Shares of Rs 10 each) to Rs 37,36,00,000 (consisting of 3,73,60,000 Equity Shares of Rs 10 each). The meeting of the Board of Directors of the Rights Issue Committee of the Company was held on March 17, 2026, from 7:00 PM to 7:30 PM.

  • Onelife Capital Advisors Ltd has allotted 2,40,00,000 Rights Equity Shares at an issue price of Rs 15 each.
  • The allotment has increased the paid-up equity share capital of the Company from Rs 13,36,00,000 to Rs 37,36,00,000.
  • The Rights Issue was finalized in consultation with BSE Limited and the Registrar to the Issue i.e., KFin Technologies Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ONELIFE CAPITAL ADVISORS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SKFINDIA] SKF India Ltd Appoints New Non-Executive, Non-Independent Directors
item.description:
SKF India Ltd has announced the appointment of three new Non-Executive, Non-Independent Directors: Mr. Antonio Molle, Mr. Bastian Thomas, and Mr. Magnus Lennart Prick. The appointments were approved by the shareholders via postal ballot on 17th March 2026. The new directors bring a combined experience of over 50 years in various fields including mechanical engineering, thermodynamic machines, business engineering, sales, and supply chain management.

  • Appointment of Mr. Antonio Molle as Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director
  • Appointment of Mr. Bastian Thomas as Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director
  • Appointment of Mr. Magnus Lennart Prick as Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director
  • The appointments were approved by the shareholders via postal ballot on 17th March 2026
  • The new directors bring a combined experience of over 50 years in various fields

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKF India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
